description: Complete breakdown of communication between frontend Claude Instance Manager and backend API services

failureSignatures.errorPattern: Network errors across all API endpoints
Access to fetch at X from origin Y has been blocked by CORS policy
failureSignatures.userImpact: API calls blocked before reaching backend

failureSignatures.context: Frontend apiUrl prop defaulting to http://localhost:3001

rootCauses.detection: All API endpoints returning connection refused
Frontend configured for different port than backend
rootCauses.configuration: Frontend apiUrl vs backend server port

rootCauses.detection: Requests timing out or being rejected at network level
Backend running but routes not accessible

preventionStrategies.implementation: Check multiple endpoints before considering backend healthy
Auto-detect backend port and URL configuration
preventionStrategies.code: const backendPorts = [3000, 3001, 3002]; for (const port of backendPorts) { try { await fetch(`http://localhost:${port}/api/health`); setApiUrl(`http://localhost:${port}`); break; } catch {} }

preventionStrategies.implementation: Detect CORS issues and suggest solutions
Fallback from WebSocket to HTTP polling when communication fails
Display detailed backend service status information
preventionStrategies.code: const serviceStatus = { api: healthy, websocket: healthy, processManager: healthy };

detectionMechanisms.implementation: Analyze failure patterns to identify root cause
Continuous monitoring of backend service availability
detectionMechanisms.interval: Every 30 seconds when active, every 5 minutes when idle

userExperienceImpact.symptom: Complete application non-functionality - no responses to any user actions
userExperienceImpact.visibility: Loading states never resolve, error messages across all components
userExperienceImpact.fallback: No graceful degradation - application becomes completely unusable
userExperienceImpact.severity: Application breaking - prevents all core functionality

diagnosticInformation.networkTab: All API requests show as failed/pending in browser developer tools

recoveryStrategies.implementation: Attempt to locate and connect to available backend services
Cache functionality and provide offline capabilities

testingRecommendations.scenario: Stop all backend services while frontend is active
testingRecommendations.expectedBehavior: Graceful error handling, recovery guidance, service status information

testingRecommendations.scenario: Test all combinations of frontend/backend port configurations
testingRecommendations.expectedBehavior: Automatic detection or clear configuration guidance

testingRecommendations.scenario: Configure backend to reject CORS requests
testingRecommendations.expectedBehavior: CORS-specific error messages and resolution guidance

testingRecommendations.scenario: Block network communication between frontend and backend
testingRecommendations.expectedBehavior: Network-specific error detection and recovery options

unitTests: Error handling for different failure types

nldMetadata.calculationMethod: (User Success Rate: 0.20 / Claude Confidence: 0.80) * TDD Factor: 0.65 = 0.18
nldMetadata.tddUsage: Very limited - No comprehensive communication failure testing or recovery mechanisms
nldMetadata.neuralTrainingStatus: Exported for claude-flow neural pattern training

claude-flowIntegration.exportFormat: Communication breakdown patterns for neural training
